creator: nevans@talkpoint.com
text: I have other systems in the 11.1 era that have Yapp built so I'm guessing this was a problem with another port that was resolved somewhere along the line. The system I was testing this on when I filed the report was handed over to another party as I was only using it for testing purposes so I never had to follow up on this. This is probably safe to close out as a one-off issue.
